directions.buyerQuestion: 使用会不会很复杂？新手能不能快速上手？
directions.finalGenerationPrompt: Create a square Amazon A+ style test-state layout for an automatic hair styling tool. Show a clear three-step beginner workflow: 1 CLAMP, 2 TWIST, 3 GLIDE. Use supplied product assets as visual reference only. Keep the product visible in every step, show a simple hair path, use clean spacing, large hierarchy, and short labels. The image is for structural testing only, not final commercial output.
directions.negativePrompt: No competitor brand, no logo, no packaging, no copied product shape from competitors, no copied button layout from competitors, no exact hand pose copied from competitor imagery, no exact callout wording from competitor images. No final product replacement, no final commercial claim, no Amazon-ready claim.

directions.buyerQuestion: 这是什么产品？它的关键结构是什么？
directions.finalGenerationPrompt: Create a square Amazon A+ style test-state product detail layout for a hair styling tool. Use one large hero product image and four structural callout cards. The callouts should identify visible structures only: control button, air vent, styling plate, and cord tail. Keep labels short and readable on mobile. Use supplied product assets as product reference. The image is for structure testing only, not final commercial output.
directions.negativePrompt: No competitor brand, no logo, no packaging, no copied product shape from competitors, no copied colorway from competitors, no copied callout arrangement from competitors, no final product replacement, no final commercial claim, no performance proof claim.
